name: moonshine-tauri
description: Sovereign Tauri terminal for FRF moonshine shells with monster-badchild + monster-guard protection

scripts.init:android: tauri android init && node scripts/patch-android-build-task.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-icons.mjs
scripts.build:android: node scripts/patch-android-build-task.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-icons.mjs && tauri android build
scripts.build:android:arm64: node scripts/patch-android-build-task.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-icons.mjs && tauri android build --target aarch64
scripts.build:android:device: node scripts/patch-android-build-task.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-icons.mjs && tauri android build --debug --target aarch64 --apk --ci
